2026-03.executiveSummary:
WeTrials continued progressing toward its vision of an AI-driven platform, with the AI Assistant and Medical Analyzer emerging as core product differentiators shaping both user experience and long-term positioning.

User activity shows early positive signals, with increased requests and registrations; however, overall engagement remains low, indicating a need to improve activation, onboarding, and user experience.

Delivery timelines remain under pressure due to the adoption of new AI-driven workflows and dependencies across teams. These constraints are expected to stabilize as processes mature.

Partner collaboration (BCC, ABTA) continues to validate product direction and future opportunities, though impact remains dependent on execution readiness and delivery consistency.

Enabling focus on FY2026 initiatives and continued product development.

insights.title: AI Capabilities Driving Product Positioning
insights.summary: AI Assistant and Medical Analyzer are emerging as core differentiators, shaping both experience and strategic positioning.

insights.title: Insight — Delivery Delays Driven by Cross-Team Misalignment
insights.summary: Delivery timelines are being impacted not only by the adoption of new AI-driven workflows, but also by misalignment and communication gaps between Platform and Product teams, affecting coordination and execution efficiency.

insights.title: Early Growth but Weak Engagement Conversion
insights.summary: User requests increased (73 → 91), but low weekly active usage indicates friction in converting users into meaningful engagement.

insights.title: Partner Validation Strong, Execution Dependent
insights.summary: Ongoing collaboration with BCC and ABTA confirms strategic direction, but impact depends on execution readiness and delivery timelines.

insights.title: Content & Data Operations Limiting Scale
insights.summary: Manual validation and content workflows are slowing scalability, indicating a need for automation or improved operational processes.

delivery.title: Vide Content Integartion to Learning Center
delivery.notes: Video content integration completed, enabling more learning Center publiucation and more euser enagagment and supporting upcoming partner go-live requirements.

delivery.title: Platform Enhancements (UX & Stability)
delivery.notes: Ongoing improvements based on partner feedback and early user interaction data.

delivery.notes: Integrated 800+ studies for pediatrc cancer patient resirece moduel

partnerMilestones.note: New studies added (e.g., Ono Pharmaceutical, Alpheus Medical); ongoing collaboration and content updates.
Enrollment Tracking Dashboard presented at annual meeting; positive feedback received.
Go-live plan communicated; timeline dependent on video integration and final validation.

comingMonthItems.text: Continue development and complete WeTrials AI Assistant
Continue development and complete AI Medical Analyzer
Enhance and expand Enrollment Tracking Dashboard (BCC)
Media and video integration into study details
Implement planned product and UX improvements

items.text: Preparation for the SR&ED FY2026 submission is in progress, including consolidation of technical documentation, experimental narratives, and alignment with reporting requirements.
Preparation for the AI Caregiver Challenge is underway, focusing on defining solution scope, aligning with program requirements, and positioning WeTrials’ capabilities for submission.
